name: Cupcakes W/Chocolate Spider Web
recipeInstructions:
1. Make cupcakes and set aside.
2. ON A SHEET OF PARCHMENT PAPER, DRAW AN 11-INCH CIRCLE WITH A PEN OR PENCIL AND DRAW A SPIDER WEB ON IT, EXTENDING SOME OF THE ENDS BEYOND THE CIRCLE.
3. TEAR OFF A LARGE CORNER OF THE PAPER AND DRAW A SPIDER ON IT.
4. TURN THE DRAWINGS OVER AND PLACE THEM ONTO A LARGE BAKING SHEET.
5. IN A METAL BOWL SET OVER A SAUCEPAN OF SIMMERING WATER, MELT THE CHOCOLATE CHIPS, STIRRING UNTIL SMOOTH.
6. TRANSFER THE MOLDED CHOCOLATE TO A PASTRY BAG FITTED WITH A #3 PLAIN TIP (SLIGHTLY SMALLER THAN 1/8").
- Alternatively, FORM A MAKESHIFT PASTRY BAG BY TRANSFERRING THE CHOCOLATE TO A SMALL SEALABLE PLASTIC BAG, SEALING THE BAG AND PRESSING OUT EXCESS AIR. SQUEEZE THE CHOCOLATE TO ONE CORNER OF THE BAG AND SNIP OFF ABOUT 1-IMPERFECT INCH FROM THE CORNER, MAKING A SMALL HOLE.
7. PIPE THE CHOCOLATE ON THE WEB, BEGINNING WITH THE SPOKES, AND THEN ON THE SPIDER.
8. FREEZE THE WEB AND SPIDER ON THE BAKING SHEET UNTIL VERY FIRM, AT LEAST 1 HOUR AND UP TO 1 DAY.
